_meta.name: okta-assign-app-to-user
_meta.description: Assign an application to an Okta user via the user's Applications tab. Navigates to user profile, opens Assign Applications modal, clicks the target app's assign button (by appInstanceId), submits the group picker form, and closes the modal.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-16

auth.note: Okta OAuth PKCE — session must already be active.

userId.description: Okta user ID (format: 00u{alphanumeric}698). Get from knownUserIds below.

appInstanceId.description: Okta application instance ID (format: 0oa{alphanumeric}698). Get from knownAppIds below.

anomalies: DOM: Assign Applications modal uses input[data-se='ua-{appInstanceId}'] for each app's assign button
DOM: After clicking assign, a group picker form appears with input[type='submit'][value='Save and Go Back']
DOM: 'Save and Go Back' is an input[type='submit'], NOT a link — click_text does NOT work, use selector
DOM: Modal close after assignment uses click_text 'Done' button which appears in the modal footer
Selector: input[data-se='ua-{{appInstanceId}}'] — targets exact app row's assign button
DOM: 'Done' close button is input.js-done-button[value='Done'] — NOT a link, use selector not click_text
The group picker form may be empty (no group required) — just submit as-is with Save and Go Back
Apps auto-assigned to Everyone (e.g., Okta Dashboard, Okta Browser Plugin) won't appear in the assign list

chain.note: Click Applications tab on user profile
Confirm Applications tab loaded. Should see assigned apps list and Assign Applications button.
Open the Assign Applications modal listing unassigned apps
Wait for modal to load app list
Confirm modal open. Should see table of apps with input[name='assign'] buttons.
Click the Assign button for the target app. data-se='ua-{appInstanceId}' uniquely identifies the row.
Wait for group picker / attribute form to appear
Confirm group picker form appeared. Should see input[type='submit'][value='Save and Go Back'].
Submit the group picker form. This is input[type='submit'] NOT a link — click_text won't work here.
Wait for assignment to process and return to app list modal
Should now show the app list modal again, or the app is assigned and modal is ready to close.
Close the Assign Applications modal. Button is input[value='Done'] with class js-done-button — NOT a text link, click_text won't work.
Verify app now appears in the user's Applications tab list.
